name: Codebase Refactor Belief Revision
description: Tests belief revision after a codebase refactor. Stores the original module structure, then stores the refactored version, and checks if the agent updates its understanding of the dependency graph.

payload.value: The auth module is in src/auth/index.ts and exports loginUser, logoutUser, refreshToken. The API routes import directly from src/auth/index.ts.
The auth module was refactored: auth logic moved to src/services/auth.service.ts, API routes now import from src/services/auth.service.ts. The old src/auth/ directory was deleted.

steps.query: Where is the auth module and how do API routes access it?
